headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, section titles, login branding

labels.classes: font-sans text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-muted-foreground
labels.usage: Overlines, small caps labels, sidebar category headers

colors.strategy: Evolve to a sophisticated warm palette. Move away from blue-tinted neutrals to crisp, high-contrast Zinc neutrals. Evolve the existing orange (#e67e22) to a richer, warmer Terracotta/Rust for accents on interior pages.

login_page.rule: STRICTLY Black and White. No orange, no secondary colors.
login_page.left_panel: Deep black (bg-zinc-950) with pure white LABrand logo and Manrope typography. Use lots of negative space.
login_page.right_panel: Pure white (bg-white) with crisp minimalist login form. Primary button is solid black. Inputs have 1px borders.

interior_pages.rule: More life and color while maintaining professionalism. Use the evolved warm orange.
interior_pages.ambient_life: Add a very subtle, blurred ambient orb in the background of the main dashboard (e.g., an absolute positioned div with bg-secondary/5 blur-[100px] w-96 h-96 top-0 right-0) to break the clinical feel without distracting from data.
interior_pages.borders: Linear-style: 1px subtle borders (border-border/60) on all cards and containers. No heavy drop shadows.
interior_pages.shadows: Replace heavy shadows with subtle inset borders or extremely diffuse small shadows (shadow-sm).

dashboard_pillars.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
dashboard_pillars.behavior: Pillar cards should have uniform heights but can span columns if one is prioritized (e.g. 'Start' pillar). Use generous padding (p-6 to p-8).

settings_reports.behavior: High density, strict grid hierarchy. Every pixel utilized.

sidebar.nav_items: Clean text-muted-foreground, hover:text-foreground. Active state uses bg-accent text-accent-foreground.

header.style: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/50 sticky top-0 z-50.
header.brand_selector: Minimalist dropdown, remove heavy background, use 1px border.

cards.icons: Icons inside cards should use the secondary color (warm orange) or primary color depending on context.

progress_bar.style: Thin and elegant. h-1.5 or h-2, rounded-full bg-muted overflow-hidden

tabs.style: Linear style. Transparent background for tab list. Active tab has a clean bottom border or floating pill style. No bulky gray backgrounds for the tab list.

layouts.app_shell: Flex layout. Sidebar fixed on left. Main content flex-1 with sticky header and scrollable area.
layouts.page_container: Max-width wrapper (max-w-7xl) inside main content with generous horizontal padding (px-6 md:px-8) and vertical padding (py-8).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Update /app/frontend/src/index.css: Replace the existing color variables with the evolved 'css_variables_light' and 'css_variables_dark' provided in this JSON.
3. Update /app/frontend/tailwind.config.js if any new keyframes or extensions are needed (e.g., ambient orbs or Linear-style shadows).

4. Refactor the Login Page (/app/frontend/src/components/LoginPage.js): Enforce the strict Black & White rule. Ensure it uses a split layout with Manrope headings. Remove all orange/accent colors here.
5. Refactor the Sidebar and Header (/app/frontend/src/components/Layout.js): Apply the subtle borders, glassmorphism header, and the new accent color for active nav items.

6. Refactor the Dashboard (/app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.js): Implement the Bento Grid for the 7 pillar cards. Add the subtle ambient blurred orb for 'life/color'. Refine the progress bar to be thin and elegant.
7. Refactor Cards (Pillar cards in App.css / custom components): Update '.pillar-card' and '.card-hover' in index.css to match the subtle 1px border and refined hover states.
8. Refactor Settings and inner pages: Ensure tabs use the minimalist Linear style. Ensure generous padding and proper typography hierarchy.
9. DO NOT remove or change any 'data-testid' attributes.
10. Run lint checks after modifying frontend files.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px borders.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., 'transition: all'). Always add transitions for specific properties (transition-colors, transition-transform).
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles (sharp or subtle 8px radius) with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap (e.g., use p-6 or p-8 inside cards).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
DO NOT use complete 'transparent' background in header, overlays, or any surface that has content under it.
